title: verbascum × lemaitrei
intro: Verbascum × lemaitrei, also known as Lemaitre's mullein, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the mullein genus and is characterized by its tall stature, white or yellow flowers, and coarse, velvety leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × lemaitrei include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and promoting a good night's sleep. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
